title: Copper Compasses
description: Compasses are now made of copper!
body:
![Copper Compasses!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3f22c54fed6154ed1a95f8a5d6a83ced2f2373.png)

##                      Compasses are now made of copper!
  In a vanilla style, giving copper more use, compasses are made of copper!
  
[Copper Compasses itch.io page](https://skulkingshadow.itch.io/copper-compasses)

## Gallery:
![showcasing the copper compasses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1da050b35054c7e8f712012c7fe45e86df3564b2.png)
![The new crafting recipe, requiring copper ingots instead of iron ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0882ded959c27781bb6a73ca53b28d8a73d13d4.png)
![Copper Compass render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfcbb563bda0741fb0de2408e344ac61b3da5f99.png)
